title: lithospermum latifolium
intro: Lithospermum latifolium, also known as broadleaf gromwell, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it a useful natural remedy for skin and wound infections. Lithospermum latifolium has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including eczema, acne, and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote healthy skin and reduce inflammation.
